Package neqsim.process.util.utilitydesign

package neqsim.process.util.utilitydesign
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    neqsim.process.util
     
  • Class
    Description
    Boiler
    Screening-level fired steam boiler / steam-generation package sizer.
    Boiler.SteamDuty
    A single steam heating duty served by the boiler.
    Deaerator
    Screening-level deaerator sizer for boiler feedwater treatment.
    NitrogenSystem
    Screening-level inert-gas (nitrogen) generation system sizer.
    NitrogenSystem.GenerationMethod
    Nitrogen generation technology, each with a representative specific energy and air-to-product ratio.
    RefrigerationCycle
    Screening-level mechanical refrigeration cycle sizer for sub-ambient process cooling.
    RefrigerationCycle.RefrigerationDuty
    A single sub-ambient refrigeration duty.
    SteamNetwork
    Screening-level multi-pressure steam network balancer.
    SteamNetwork.SteamHeader
    A single steam header (pressure level) in the network.
    UtilityCompressionOptimizer
    Closed-loop optimizer for a two-stage utility-gas compression package (instrument air, fuel gas, or an export booster).
    UtilityCompressionOptimizer.TotalPowerObjective
    Custom optimizer objective: the summed first- and second-stage compressor power.
    UtilitySystemDesigner
    Screening-level utility-system designer for oil & gas process flowsheets.
    UtilitySystemDesigner.CoolingDemand
    A harvested process cooling demand.
    UtilitySystemDesigner.HeatingDemand
    A harvested process heating demand.
    UtilitySystemDesigner.ShaftLoad
    A harvested rotating-equipment shaft load.
    UtilitySystemDesigner.SteamLevel
    A steam level available to satisfy process heating duty.
